titleStmt.title: SII 16.183: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 183. (A.R. No. 167 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPUR, MARAKPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the platform in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.

This is dated in Śaka 1475 (current), Paridhāvin, Jyēshṭha 12. It is not clear from the record whether the paksha was s11uddha or bahuḷa. The year and the month respectively corresponded to 1552 A.D., and June. The date cannot be verified for want of the other details.

The inscription is damaged and seems to record a remission of the tax ākula-mantrāyam on the betel leaf growers of Mārakāpuram which they, in turn, appear to have made over to the temple. It mentions Kasavakaṇṭi Padmanābhayyaṁgāru, the kāryakartta of the king, Malappaṁgāru, the mudrakartta of Māḍrāju Nāraparāju and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī ...
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śāli
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1475 Agunēṭi
paridhāvi saṁvatsara jēṣṭa 12 lu śrīmānmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvamahārāya
lu vidyānagaramaṁdu prithivisāmrājyamu
śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍḍalēśvara rāmarāja yadēva
mahārājula Ayyavāri kāryakarttalaina
kasavakaṁṭi padmanābhayyaṁgārunnu māḍrā
ju nārapa rājayyavāri mudrakartta
gi malappaṁgārunnu stānācāryu
Appayyaṁgārunnu karanaṁvāru
yatiṁmmayya canamaya
caṁnaya Ayappagārunnu mārakāpu
raṁ Ākuṁdōṭelu sēśēvāriki yicina
śāsanaṁ mārakāpurānnu cannapa
ku Ākudōṁṭelu śēśiAṁdula [Āku]
la maṁtrāyamunnu mīku trikāla
mugā Istimi gāna yidi mōdalugānu
mārakāpurāna kēsava yaṁ
la grāmālavāru
peṭi maṁtrāyamunnu canarā
yala gānakē kaṭṭaḍa The
Digital edition of SII 16.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
